svg.text: Income Layer Activation and Drawdown Reference
Current default profiles. Curves show income-layer target allocation by account equity; log curves approach caps gradually.
Legend: dot=start, hollow dot=band end, x=95% of hard cap
Note: TQQQ and SOXL drawdowns use the latest $1M combined income-layer candidate comparison. Other profiles show configured stress drawdown budget, not full historical combined backtest.
Generated from STRATEGY_DEFAULT_CONFIG and resolve_income_layer_ratio on 2026-05-26.
